evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI Hub @ CUHK aims to serve as the one-stop hub for AI resources at the University. University provides various AI tools and services to support teaching, learning, research, and work. The AI Hub @ CUHK offers an overview of these resources, aiding users in selecting appropriate technology for their needs.
evidenceLocator: ITSC AI Hub page, main description
